prompts.description: Generalize JSON import to accept TDA from all Solutions
prompts.notes: UniversalTDAImport.swift created with SolutionSource, UniversalTDAExperiment, TDADataset, LegacyFormatAdapter, UniversalDataLoader. Test JSONs for Pendulum Solver and Data Phi Sheaf added.

prompts.description: Add Nature environment backgrounds from Sachuest Point
Implement hand gesture interaction for 3D persistence diagrams
prompts.notes: GestureRecorder.swift created with timestamped event capture for Golden Cipher restriction map. PointCloud3DView: pinch-select (TapGesture cycles through points), dragRotate + spreadZoom recording, selected point info panel. PersistenceDiagramView: spread-zoom via MagnificationGesture with scaleEffect, double-tap reset, tapAnnotate with annotation input field. PhaseSpaceTrajectoryView: slicing plane (X/Y/Z axis filter with threshold slider), dragRotate + spreadZoom recording. All events feed GestureRecorder for session export to assets/processed/vision_sessions/.

prompts.description: Phase space manipulation from SSEUQFT data
Spatial audio — map Betti numbers to Shepard tones
Build restriction map exporters to Golden Cipher and Witness
prompts.notes: SessionRecorder.swift: gaze (S2 azimuth/elevation, throttled 10Hz), hand positions (R3), navigation path, delegates gestures to GestureRecorder. RestrictionMapExporter.swift: writes three restriction maps — Golden Cipher (trajectory_*.jsonl with gesture+gaze+nav events), Witness (session_*.jsonl audit trail), Data Phi Sheaf (annotations_*.json). PersistenceViewerApp.swift: auto-exports on scenePhase .background via @StateObject SessionRecorder. ContentView.swift: toolbar menu with manual 'Export Session Now' trigger and confirmation alert.

prompts.description: Integrate with Sachuest Now as the initial calm experience
